title: malvastrum marrubioides var. viscidum
intro: Malvastrum marrubioides var. viscidum, also known as a variety of the Malvastrum marrubioides plant, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Malvastrum marrubioides var. viscidum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
